title: Picture Narration
description: Explore a busy park or market picture, name the details you notice, and hear them replayed as a story.
learningGoals: Build descriptive vocabulary through close observation
Name familiar objects and actions aloud
interactionModel: listen to a noticing prompt, tap a matching open-ended sticker, and name the pictured detail aloud
feedbackModel: Every valid noticing is repeated in a curious teacher voice, sparkles into the journal, and returns in the spoken recap.

modes.title: At the Park
modes.skill: observing and describing details in a park scene

modes.title: At the Market
modes.skill: naming and describing familiar market sights and sounds

credits: QLOBE Kids contributors; placeholder emoji only (see ASSETS.md).
